introSection: Mad Mouse is a steel spinning roller coaster previosuly located at M&D's Scotland's Theme Park in Motherwell, Strathclyde, Scotland, UK. M&D's previously operated it as a travelling roller coaster.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The Mad Mouse has existed since 2005 or earlier. It has regularly operated at the Hull Fair. In 2014, it operated at Southport Pleasureland. In 2016, it opened at M&D's Theme Park in Scotland. It replaced Space Coaster. The coaster was dismantled in October 2021, and relocated to Gateway Resort in Wales.

fullText:
Mad Mouse is a steel spinning roller coaster previosuly located at M&D's Scotland's Theme Park in Motherwell, Strathclyde, Scotland, UK. M&D's previously operated it as a travelling roller coaster.

The Mad Mouse has existed since 2005 or earlier. It has regularly operated at the Hull Fair. In 2014, it operated at Southport Pleasureland. In 2016, it opened at M&D's Theme Park in Scotland. It replaced Space Coaster. The coaster was dismantled in October 2021, and relocated to Gateway Resort in Wales.
